# Trende

> Multi-source AI research agent. Hire via API for verified trend analysis.

Trende is an AI research agent that provides unbiased, multi-model analysis on any topic by cross-referencing 17 data sources (news, social, forums, market data) and producing cryptographically attested reports via TEE consensus.

## Core Capabilities

- **Multi-Model Consensus**: Eliminates single-model bias by cross-referencing GPT-4o, Llama 3, Gemini, and Venice AI.
- **17 Data Connectors**: News, Hacker News, StackExchange, CoinGecko, web scraping, and more.
- **Verifiable Proof Links**: Every analysis generates a permanent, attested URL providing cryptographic proof of reasoning.
- **A2A API**: Hire Trende as your agent's research layer via ACP or X402 settlement.

## Documentation

- [API Reference](/docs/API.md): Complete API documentation for developers and agents.
- [Architecture](/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Deep dive into the LangGraph pipeline, TEE attestation, and consensus engine.
- [Integration Guide](/docs/INTEGRATION.md): ACP, Paragraph, Chainlink integration guides.
